description: Tier 0 base case for the Jackel et al. low-temperature DCS Si epitaxy example and the attached 2D CFD-ACE+ schematic.

paper.title: Surface chemistry models for low temperature Si epitaxy process simulation in a single-wafer reactor
notes: DCS is the Si source, H2 is the carrier, pressure is about 300 Torr, and T < 700 C.
Si process paper flows: main inlet 9000 sccm H2 + 400 sccm DCS; bottom slit 5000 sccm H2; side inlet 400 sccm H2 + about 100 sccm DCS.
Empirical Si model: GR = K exp(-(Ea/R)/T) (p_HCl/p_DCS)^a_HCl with K=1.2e25 m/s, Ea/R=95559 K, a_HCl=-3.419.

calibration.note: Approximate max |Dep_SI(B)| from the attached CFD-ACE+ screenshot colorbar; replace with exported wafer-average or radial line-probe values when available.
